news.headline: Medigene AG selects KRAS G12V as the first target for TCR-TCEs in cancer treatment with WuXi Biologics.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Medigene AG (Medigene or the “Company”, FSE: MDG1, Prime Standard) revealed the choice of Kirsten rat sarcoma viral oncogene homologue (KRAS) G12V, with HLA*A11, as the primary target for developing T cell receptor-guided T cell engagers (TCR-TCEs) in collaboration with WuXi Biologics. Medigene focuses on the research and advancement of T cell receptor (TCR)-guided therapies for cancer treatment.

news.headline: Zentiva AG completes voluntary public purchase offer for APONTIS PHARMA AG in Frankfurt, Germany on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Zentiva AG, a subsidiary of Zentiva Pharma GmbH based in Frankfurt, Germany, and a part of the Zentiva group, has successfully concluded a voluntary public buyout offer for APONTIS PHARMA AG. The transaction took place on December 9, 2024. The specific numbers involved in the deal were not disclosed in the provided information.

news.headline: Australian fintech sector contracts, blockchain, crypto down by 14%7% of Aussie fintechs shut down in 2024; blockchain firms hit hardest, KPMG report shows.
news.summary: A recent report by KPMG has shown that more than 7% of fintech companies in Australia shut down in 2024. Among them, blockchain firms were the most prominent in the decline.

news.headline: Sydbank's share buyback program saw transactions in week 49.
Litecoin, Dogecoin hash rates surged after mining company reveals 3X profit over Bitcoin. LTC at 1.7128 PH/s (+15%), DOGE at 1.58 PH/s.
news.summary: Litecoin (LTC) and Dogecoin (DOGE) experienced a significant increase in hash rate over the weekend following revelations from a mining company that mining these two coins generated three times more profit than mining Bitcoin (BTC) alone. Litecoin's hash rate surged by 15% from 1.48 PetaHashes per second to an all-time high of 1.7128 PH/s, as reported by Coinwarz. Concurrently, Dogecoin's hash rate surpassed 2.52 PH/s for the first time before retracting to 1.58 PH/s. This development has drawn attention from investors and analysts, including Cathie Wood of Ark Invest, who recently commented on Bitcoin's spike to $100,000. For further details, refer to the full story on a financial news platform.

news.headline: Kremlin: There have been no contacts with Trump so far.
Australian fintech industry contracts, blockchain & crypto sector sees 14% drop. 7% of fintech companies shut down in 2024, per KPMG report.
news.summary: In 2024, more than 7% of fintech companies in Australia shut down, with blockchain companies experiencing the most prominent drop, as per findings from a report by KPMG.

HelloFresh stock drops post ABC report highlighting use of migrant teen workers.
Hong Kong Monetary Authority assesses currency board and economic future, including HKD stability and global market risks.
news.summary: During a recent meeting, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority addressed various topics including the stability of the Hong Kong Dollar (HKD), economic growth prospects, and potential risks in the global markets. Key issues discussed included HKD exchange rate stability, measures to promote economic growth, and strategies to mitigate risks amidst global market uncertainties. The meeting highlighted the importance of monitoring economic indicators closely and adopting proactive measures to safeguard the stability of the HKD.Participants also emphasized the need for coordinating efforts to address potential threats and maintain a resilient stance in the face of volatile global market conditions.

news.headline: HKMA broadens retail banking data access in HK with Open API, facilitating key datasets for innovative use in applications.
news.summary: Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has broadened its dataset options by introducing an Open API, aimed at improving information on retail banking services. This move is expected to fuel the development of creative solutions and is a step towards fostering innovation in the sector. The Open API provides access to a wide range of data, enhancing transparency and encouraging the creation of new applications. This initiative by HKMA is set to provide valuable insights into retail banking facilities and drive collaboration within the industry, signaling a positive development for the financial sector in Hong Kong.

news.headline: Telkomsel boosts 5G network in Greater Jakarta, connecting Christmas & New Year spirits. Expanding Hyper 5G network.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, as of December 9, 2024, Telkomsel is asserting its dominance in the digital telecommunications sector by aggressively expanding its Hyper 5G network in the Greater Jakarta region, specifically in Jabodetabek. This move signifies Telkomsel's dedication to enhancing its services and reach in the area, solidifying its position as the top provider of telecommunications services. This expansion is set to greatly benefit residents in the region by providing faster and more reliable network speeds.

news.headline: Apurva Kempinski Bali wins 'Best Sustainable Hotel' at 2024 ULTRAs Awards, praised for environmental efforts.
news.summary: A top-rated five-star resort in BALI, Indonesia, has garnered worldwide acclaim for its dedication to environmental, social, and governance values. On December 9, 2024, The Apurva Kempinski Bali further solidified its position as a sustainable luxury trailblazer on a global scale.

news.headline: 2024 Guangming Science City Forum held in Shenzhen, China with the theme "Building Dreams for the Future."
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, the 2024 Guangming Science City Forum commenced in Shenzhen, located in the Guangdong Province of China. The event, under the theme "Guangming: Building Dreams for the Future," took place in the Guangming district. This two-day forum aimed to discuss various topics related to science, technology, and innovation, featuring prominent speakers and experts in the field.

news.headline: iQIYI introduces 'Extra Large Font' function for senior users, enhancing accessibility with tailored features.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, iQIYI, China's top online entertainment platform, introduced a new feature called 'Extra Large Font' on its app. This feature includes a range of accessibility options designed specifically for elderly users and to accommodate the visual needs of a wider audience.

news.headline: Mibro Fit App integrates with Strava, enhancing user experience; Strava has over 100 million athletes.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on Dec. 9, 2024, ZhenShi Information Technology's brand Mibro revealed an exciting development - the seamless merging of the Mibro Fit App and Strava. Strava is a prominent digital platform for active individuals, boasting over 100 million athletes in its community.

news.headline: Heimar hf. purchased 3,000,000 own shares in week 49 for 105,600,000 ISK as part of buyback program.
news.summary: During the 49th week, Heimar hf. acquired 3,000,000 of its own shares for a total cost of 105,600,000 Icelandic Krona.

news.headline: US President-elect Trump's Middle East Envoy: The hostages better be released before inauguration; it would not be a pretty day if they are not.
Orange and La Poste are partnering to repurpose network equipment used during Paris 2024 Games, aligning with CSR strategies.
news.summary: Orange and La Poste have partnered to introduce a groundbreaking project aiming to prolong the life of network equipment utilized during the Paris 2024 Olympic and Paralympics. This joint effort, aligning with the Corporate Social Responsibility strategies of both firms, seeks to reduce the environmental repercussions of digital technology. This initiative is a crucial part of the Paris 2024 legacy, concentrating on refurbishing equipment for alternative locations and purposes post the Olympic Games.

news.headline: Xsolla partners with StarNest and Azerbaijan’s IDDA to launch Xsolla StarNest Academy and Incubator Program at Gamesummit Winter Edition 2024 in Baku.
news.summary: A global video game commerce company, Xsolla, has confirmed a key partnership with StarNest and Azerbaijan’s Innovation and Digital Development Agency (IDDA) to launch the Xsolla StarNest Academy and Incubator Program. This significant collaboration was introduced at Gamesummit Winter Edition 2024, the largest gaming festival in the region, held in Baku, Azerbaijan. The event highlighted the rising momentum of Azerbaijan's gaming sector.

news.headline: CYPFER partners with Sovereign Bank to enhance digital defenses amid rising cyber threats globally.
news.summary: In response to the increasing cyber threats, Sovereign Bank is strengthening its digital defenses to safeguard customer data and financial transactions. This initiative is being undertaken in collaboration with CYPFER, a renowned cybersecurity firm. The efforts to enhance security measures are being implemented in various locations including Miami, New York, Toronto, London, and Dubai. The partnership aims to fortify the bank's protection mechanisms in the face of growing digital vulnerabilities. The decision to bolster defenses reflects the importance of ensuring the security of customer information and financial activities.

news.headline: Qn-SOLAR partners with CLS Solar Service for 5MW PV project in Svishtov, Bulgaria, to boost agriculture.
news.summary: In an important milestone for sustainable agricultural progress, a recent partnership announcement reveals Qn-SOLAR's collaboration with CLS Solar Service Bulgaria for a revolutionary 5MW ground-mounted photovoltaic (PV) initiative named Project Svishtov, located in SVISHTOV, Bulgaria. The project marks a significant advancement in sustainable energy generation and will play a crucial role in shaping the future of solar power technology in the region.

news.headline: Ellucian partners with Prolifics Testing to modernize UK higher education systems, effective Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: A strategic alliance has been formed to aid in the upgrade of the student information system used by educational institutions in the UK. This partnership was revealed by Ellucian, a prominent provider of technology solutions for higher education. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024, in Borehamwood, England and Reston, Virginia. This initiative aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of student information systems in UK institutions.

news.headline: DNV report emphasizes on food industry's push for sustainability amid global challenges, highlighting the need for supply chain transformation.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on December 9, 2024, a report by DNV, an independent assurance and risk management provider, emphasized the critical necessity for the food and beverage industry to revamp its supply chains in order to adhere to sustainability requirements in the face of pressing global issues such as climate change. The report underlines the necessity for urgent action to address these challenges.

news.headline: Emirates NBD partners with HireVue for HR transformation; to enhance recruitment and employee experience in MENAT region.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on December 9, 2024, a renowned company called HireVue, known for its innovative solutions in Human Potential Intelligence, revealed a major partnership. Emirates NBD, a prominent banking group in the MENAT region, which includes the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye, has decided to utilize HireVue's platform for improving their talent strategies. This collaboration signifies a significant step for both parties, showcasing the importance of modern technology in talent management. This move underscores Emirates NBD's commitment to enhancing its workforce and staying competitive in the region.

news.headline: RavenQuest MMORPG expands with player rewards in web3 gaming post land sale, building a global community with innovative features.
news.summary: RavenQuest, a prominent MMORPG within the web3 industry, has launched a set of fresh player incentives following a lucrative land sale. This move aims to nurture a worldwide player base with cutting-edge attributes and enhance the overall gaming experience.

news.headline: New STLS trading on BitMEX with $20,000 incentive program for trading, depositing, and buying until Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: BitMEX has recently launched STLS token trading, providing users with an opportunity to potentially earn up to $20,000 by engaging in trading, depositing, and purchasing activities. This initiative is set to run until December 31, 2024, allowing participants to capitalize on the promotion within the specified timeframe.

news.headline: Apollo and Santander collaborate on a $370M infrastructure financing deal through Apollo-managed funds and affiliates, led by Apterra.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, Apollo (NYSE: APO) and Santander revealed a new partnership where Apollo-managed funds and affiliates will be investing in an infrastructure credit portfolio worth around $370 million. The deal, orchestrated by Apterra, an Apollo affiliate established in 2023 focusing on unique financing for infrastructure ventures, marks a significant move in the industry.

news.headline: Bitrue partners with Babylon Labs for Bitcoin Staking Dual Rewards Program, offering users new rewards opportunity.
news.summary: In Victoria, BC on December 9, 2024, the renowned Bitrue cryptocurrency exchange has revealed a partnership with Babylon Labs to introduce a novel Bitcoin native staking rewards program for their users. Babylon Labs, a key player in the industry, has crafted this innovative program that aims to...

news.headline: Chinese govt announcement leads to a surge in stocks, hitting a record high of +3.5%. #China #stocks #recordhigh
Share buyback programme for week 49 included Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, London Stock Exchange, Danish Financial Supervisory Authority, and other stakeholders.
news.summary: The Danish Financial Supervisory Authority, along with other stakeholders, are investigating certain activities on the Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and London Stock Exchange. Key numbers of trades and transactions are being reviewed for potential irregularities and compliance with regulations. This investigation aims to ensure transparency and market integrity within the financial sector.

news.headline: BitOasis, part of CoinDCX, secures full VASP license in Dubai, completing VARA licensing process for crypto trading services.
news.summary: BitOasis has finalized its acquisition of the full Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) license, completing the VARA licensing process. This move allows BitOasis to offer a variety of cryptocurrency trading services.

news.headline: Preliminary data indicates early redemptions on bonds, announced to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S on 9 December 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a public announcement (No. 103/2024) was made to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S.

news.headline: Acer's November revenues: NT$22.75 billion, 20.9% growth MoM, 13.1% growth YoY. Year-to-November revenues: NT$240.16 billion.
news.summary: In Taipei on December 9, 2024, Acer Inc. disclosed its consolidated revenues for November, totaling NT$22.75 billion, marking a 20.9% increase from the previous month and a 13.1% rise compared to the same period last year. The year-to-date consolidated revenues up to November stood at NT$240.16 billion, reflecting a 10.4% growth compared to the previous year. The company's stock is listed on the TWSE as 2353.

VersaBank (NASDAQ: VBNK) is anticipated to reveal earnings of $0.41 per share on revenue of $29.20 million. Nykredit Realkredit A/S reports prepayments of CK93.
Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, celebrates 6th anniversary on Dec 9, 2024 with livestream event.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Dubai, the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit, known as the world's second-largest by trading volume, is organizing a celebration to commemorate six years of achievements and innovation. This event will be live-streamed for its global community.

news.headline: Nanoprecise Sci Corp. appoints Kevin Clark as Chief Evangelist Officer to lead global brand expansion, with over two decades of technology leadership.
news.summary: Nanoprecise Sci Corp., headquartered in Edmonton, AB, revealed on December 9, 2024, that Kevin Clark has been selected as the Chief Evangelist Officer. The company specializes in Energy-Centered Predictive Maintenance solutions and is renowned in the industry. Clark brings more than 20 years of technology leadership background to his new role.

news.headline: Novatron Fusion Group secures €3 million for fusion energy technology project with KTH, KIPT, UKAEA, and EIT InnoEnergy.
news.summary: A collaborative effort between Novatron Fusion Group, KTH Royal Institute of Technology, KIPT, UKAEA, and EIT InnoEnergy has resulted in the initiation of the TauEB project. This project, launched on December 9, 2024, aims to bring about revolutionary changes in the field.

news.headline: Hello Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MOMO) releases Q3 2024 unaudited financial results. Key figures not specified.
news.summary: Beijing, December 9, 2024 - Hello Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MOMO), a prominent participant in mainland China's online social networking industry, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. In this period, the company reported notable figures, including its net profits.

news.headline: Optiver, a leading options giant, predicts Japan's market is set for a significant upsurge.
Stocks to watch on Monday: Toll Brothers (TOL) expected to report earnings of $4.33 per share on revenue of $3.17 billion. Toll Brothers shares rose 0.6% to $155.00 after-hours.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading a bit lower on Monday, drawing attention to certain stocks that may pique investor interest today. The focus is on Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), as Wall Street anticipates its quarterly earnings to be reported at $4.33 per share with a revenue of $3.17 billion after the closing bell. Toll Brothers' shares saw a 0.6% rise, reaching $155.00 in after-hours trading. Additionally, analysts are keen on Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:CASY) for the day's developments. For further details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq reach record highs after November jobs data beats expectations, Fear & Greed Index neutral.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in overall market sentiment, resting in the "Neutral" zone on Friday. U.S. stocks displayed a mixed performance with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite achieving fresh record highs post the release of positive November jobs data. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq saw gains for the third consecutive week, rising by 0.96% and 3.34% respectively, while the Dow experienced a 0.6% decline throughout the week. Nonfarm payrolls surged by 227,000, a significant increase from the previously revised 36,000 and surpassing the projected 200,000 according to TradingEconomics estimates. The unemployment rate also rose from 4.1% to 4.2%, matching expectations. Average hourly earnings showed a 0.4% monthly increase, consistent with October's growth and exceeding anticipated figures. For more details, head to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Advantest introduces KGD test cell for power semiconductors with HA1100 Die Prober and CREA MT Tester to optimize wide-bandgap device yield.
news.summary: A recently developed integrated test cell combines a new dedicated HA1100 Die Prober and CREA MT Tester to optimize yield for wide-bandgap devices. The HA1100 Die Prober and CREA MT Tester work together seamlessly to enhance production efficiency and improve testing outcomes. This integrated test cell is designed to streamline the testing process and maximize yield rates for wide-bandgap devices. The collaboration of these two technologies is expected to significantly impact the efficiency and success of testing procedures for these devices.

news.headline: Security of Russian Military bases in Syria is fully ensured - Interfax cites Russian Lawmaker
Netcracker President Sylvain Seignour to speak at Telecom Review Leaders' Summit in Dubai during day one.
news.summary: Netcracker's President, Sylvain Seignour, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Telecom Review Leaders' Summit in Dubai. This event will take place during day one of the summit, providing an opportunity for industry leaders to discuss key topics and strategies. The summit is expected to draw a substantial number of attendees, including executives, experts, and professionals from the telecommunications sector. This participation underscores Netcracker's commitment to engaging with key stakeholders in the industry and contributing to important discussions.
